heroSection.title: Job Tracker
heroSection.subTitle: Gmail-Synced Desktop App
heroSection.description: A Kanban board that fills itself: job applications auto-synced from Gmail and classified by a local AI, so your inbox never leaves your machine.

mainContent.overview: Built and packaged a full-stack job application tracker that connects to Gmail (read-only) and classifies emails into applications, interviews, offers, and rejections through a hybrid pipeline: a deterministic parser handles the common job boards, and a local Ollama LLM handles the rest, so no inbox data ever leaves the machine. Applications surface in a Kanban board and sortable table backed by SQLite, and an Electron desktop launcher packages everything into a self-updating Windows app that runs with nothing preinstalled.

keyFeature.body: Scans a configurable window (30/60/90/180 days) with live progress streaming to the UI. Already-processed emails are skipped, failed classifications are retried on the next sync, and manual edits are never overwritten
A deterministic parser covers the common job boards first; only the ambiguous remainder reaches a local Ollama model. No cloud API, no key, and no inbox data leaving the machine
Confirmations, interviews, and rejections for the same job merge into one card, even when company names are spelled differently across emails, with job requisition numbers as the strongest dedup key

Kanban board with collapsible columns and drag between statuses, sortable table with pagination, shared live search, provenance badges (Imported, Parser, AI), and links back to the source Gmail messages on every card

Import applications without connecting Gmail at all, or export to a portable CSV that opens in Excel or Google Sheets. The export is fully re-importable, so your data stays usable outside the app entirely

An Electron launcher starts and stops everything, manages Ollama and its models, and holds configuration. Ships as a Windows installer or portable zip that needs nothing preinstalled and keeps itself current with automatic updates

walkthrough.description: Connect Gmail with read-only access, pick a scan window (30/60/90/180 days), and watch applications stream onto the board in real time, landing with a NEW badge. Each card shows how it was classified (Parser, AI, or Imported), a Fast Applied badge for LinkedIn and Indeed quick applies, and a chip for each tracked email linking back to the Gmail message behind that status change. Re-syncs skip already-processed emails and never touch manual edits.

A denser alternative to the board with sortable columns, pagination, and the same live search. New rows are highlighted with a green border, badges and email chips carry over inline, and rows with an undetected role are flagged for a quick manual fix.

walkthrough.subheader: Your data, anywhere, no sync required
walkthrough.description: Import applications without ever connecting Gmail, or export everything to a CSV that opens directly in Excel or Google Sheets. Exports carry the company domain and job ID, so a re-imported file merges onto existing records instead of creating duplicates.

Add or edit any application by hand, with an Interview Stage dropdown that appears only for interviews and an Interviewed Before Rejection checkbox that keeps the interview rate accurate. A Tracked Emails section lists every linked Gmail message and lets you attach or detach one by pasting a Gmail link.

An Electron launcher starts and stops the whole stack, installs Ollama and its model if missing, and holds all configuration in a built-in Config panel. It ships as a Windows installer or portable zip that runs with nothing preinstalled and updates itself with a changelog and live download progress.
